summary: Iteration 5 frontend E2E verification on /hrms.html — BUG-FIX VERIFIED. The fix of replacing all jQuery DataTables call-sites with explicit jQuery(...) references (lines 1008, 1012, 1022, 1486, 1587, 1620, 1687 in /app/index.html) fully resolves the iteration_4 regression. All 7 review items PASS: DataTable wrappers + search + pagination + length controls now render on Employees / Users / Audit Logs / Reports; Add Employee end-to-end (FX001 'Fix Verify', DOB 1985-03-20 → retirementDate auto 2045-03-31) succeeded with 'Saved successfully' toast AND new row visible in #dt-employees tbody (rows 3 → 4); no DataTable console errors observed; sidebar still shows nav-users + nav-auditLogs for super_admin (iter_3 fix preserved); forgot-password empty-email still shows 'Enter your email first' toast.
verifications_passed: Login (admin@iaad.gov.in / Admin@12345) succeeds; super_admin role badge shown
Sidebar nav-users + nav-auditLogs both visible for super_admin (no regression of iteration_3 role fix)
Employees page: #dt-employees_wrapper present, .dataTables_filter input present, .dataTables_paginate present, .dataTables_length present; tbody shows 3 existing rows on entry
Add Employee flow: modal opens via [data-testid=add-employees-btn]; manavSampadaId='FX001', name='Fix Verify', dob='1985-03-20' filled; retirementDate auto-fills exactly to '2045-03-31'
After [data-testid=save-record-btn] click: '.app-toast' shows 'Saved successfully' AND #dt-employees tbody row containing 'Fix Verify' visible within <6s; row count 3 → 4
Users page: #dt-users_wrapper present, .dataTables_filter present, 2 rows rendered (admin + seeded test user)
Audit Logs page: #dt-audit_wrapper present, 50 rows rendered (paginated)
Reports → run-employeeList: #rpt-table renders inside a .dataTables_wrapper with 4 rows (one per employee in DB)
Forgot password with empty email shows .app-toast 'Enter your email first'
Zero DataTable-related console/page errors observed throughout the session (previously: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading DataTable)' / '$(...).DataTable is not a function')
critical_code_review_comments: MEDIUM (carried over): /app/index.html is 1900+ lines — consider splitting into modules (auth.js, modules.js, render.js, dt-init.js) to prevent recurrence of subtle scoping bugs like this.

LOW: Codebase still has the `const $ = (s,p=document)=>p.querySelector(s)` shadowing helper at line 435. It works now because all jQuery call-sites were qualified, but the convention is brittle — any future contributor writing $(selector).DataTable(...) will re-introduce the bug. Recommend either renaming the helper to `qs` or adding an ESLint rule / comment block warning against the shadowing.

LOW: renderTable() does not defensively check typeof jQuery.fn.DataTable === 'function'. If DataTables CDN fails to load, the failure mode would again be silent in production. A one-line guard with a user-visible toast would help.
seed_data_creation: Created one new employee record FX001 'Fix Verify' (DOB 1985-03-20, retirement 2045-03-31) during regression. Total employees in DB is now 4. No cleanup performed — the row is visible in #dt-employees and can be deleted from the UI if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_5 fix is confirmed working end-to-end. The jQuery `$` shadowing bug is fully neutralised by qualifying every DataTables call-site with `jQuery(...)`. If future work touches /app/index.html DataTables init code, ensure new code also uses `jQuery(...)` (NOT the local `$` helper). Test DB now contains 4 employees including FX001 'Fix Verify' from this run plus QA001, TEST001, 1120919 from prior iterations.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA confirmed in iteration_4. FIX (iteration_5): replaced 7 jQuery-API call-sites with explicit `jQuery(...)` references. VERIFIED in this iteration: DataTable wrappers render on all 4 affected tables, the Add Employee Save → toast → tbody-row regression is closed, and the console is free of the previously-thrown TypeErrors.
